title: Onboarded OpenClaw User
objective: A user state that looks past first-run onboarding, with gateway, profile, and plugin folders already present.

setup.title: Write Onboarding Markers
setup.intent: Create common first-run completion markers and baseline user folders.
commands: ocm env exec {env} -- node -e 'const fs=require("fs"), path=require("path"); const home=process.env.OPENCLAW_HOME; const dirs=["plugins",".openclaw/plugins","sessions","workspace","config"]; for (const dir of dirs) fs.mkdirSync(path.join(home,dir),{recursive:true}); const state={schemaVersion:"kova.fixture.onboarding.v1",onboarded:true,createdAt:new Date().toISOString()}; for (const rel of ["onboarding.json",".openclaw/onboarding.json","config/onboarding.json"]) fs.writeFileSync(path.join(home,rel),JSON.stringify(state,null,2));'

cleanupGuarantees: disposable env cleanup removes state fixture files
